title: Dashboard enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Import BI workbooks (Beta)**: Add a Tableau or Power BI file to Genie Code and it builds an AI/BI dashboard that replicates your visualizations. See [Import BI files using Genie Code](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/import-bi).
* **Open-source fonts**: Over 20 new open-source fonts are now available as defaults. See [Customize colors and fonts](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/settings#custom-font).
* **Parameter values in text widgets**: Dashboard authors can now reference parameter values in text widgets. See [Use parameters in text widgets](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/filters/parameters#text-widgets).
* **Genie Code non-table outputs**: Genie Code can now render non-table outputs, including charts, text blocks, and other content.
* **Answer now for Genie on published dashboards**: Genie on published dashboards now supports **Answer now**. Answer now stops Genie from thinking and produces an immediate answer to the user question, at the cost of deeper analysis.

ref_links.text: Import BI files using Genie Code
